### Ajoutés (5)

- `color-picker/color-picker.component.md` (18 lignes)

- `button/button.md` (43 → 43 lignes, +0)

  ````diff
  @@ ... @@
   
   ```html
  -<button type="button" prButton
  +<button type="button" luButton
   >Button</button>
   ```
  @@ ... @@
   ### ButtonComponent (component)
   
  -**Selectors:** `button[prButton]`, `a[prButton]`, `span[prButton]`, `button[luButton]`, `a[luButton]`, `span[luButton]`

  ````

  ````diff
  @@ ... @@
   	<lu-checkbox-input [ngModel]="false"></lu-checkbox-input>

  -<lu-filter-pill label="Legumes" name="legume">
  +<lu-filter-pill label="Légume (multi)" name="legume">

   		[ngModel]="[]"
  @@ ... @@

  +		filterPillLabelPlural="Légumes"
   	/>
   </lu-filter-pill>
  -<lu-filter-pill label="Legume" name="department">
  +<lu-filter-pill label="Legume (simple)" name="department">
   	<lu-simple-select [ngModel]="null" [options]="legumes | filterLegumes: clue" />
   </lu-filter-pill>
  @@ ... @@

   </lu-filter-pill>
  -<lu-filter-pill label="Tree simple">
  +<lu-filter-pill label="Tree (simple)">

  ````
